note: Panicles with visible white anthers (anthesis) over mostly green grains -> reproductive/flowering stage. CROPSTATE_RESULTS/vision_final/best_checkpoint.pt misclassifies this as ripening at low confidence (0.35), with reproductive as the second most likely class (0.22) -- a realistic low-confidence/misclassified case for the adaptive-soft-gating vs hard-filtering comparison.

Dense, uniform leafy canopy with no panicles emerged -> vegetative/tillering stage. CROPSTATE_RESULTS/vision_final/best_checkpoint.pt misclassifies this as reproductive at low confidence (0.28) -- ground truth and top-1 prediction disagree, so hard top-1 filtering retrieves zero relevant evidence while soft gating can still recover it.
